errors.internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthenticated: You must be signed in to do that.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.validation: Some of the information you provided is invalid.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidToken: Your session is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again shortly.
errors.fileTooLarge: The {kind} file is too large. Maximum allowed size is {max}.
errors.invalidAudioType: Unsupported audio format. Allowed: MP3, WAV, M4A.
errors.invalidImageType: Unsupported image format. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
errors.notOwner: You can only modify your own content.
errors.notPlaylistOwner: You can only modify your own playlists.
errors.alreadyFollowing: You are already following this user.
errors.notFollowing: You are not following this user.
errors.trackAlreadyInPlaylist: This track is already in the playlist.
errors.invalidState: This action isn't allowed in the current state.
errors.genreNotFound: The selected genre does not exist.
errors.dailyUploadLimit: You've reached your daily upload limit of {limit}. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.duplicateFile: You have already uploaded this exact file.
errors.bannedContent: Your title or description contains content that isn't allowed.
errors.uploadIncomplete: The upload is incomplete. Please finish all required steps first.
errors.reportExists: You have already reported this track.
